description.ko: 기술과 자연의 완벽한 결합인 AURA-7은 금속성 표면과 부드러운 빛이 지속적이고 리드미컬하게 상호작용하는 유동적 실체로 나타나며, 이는 생물학적 성장의 조화를 상징합니다.
description.en: A seamless synthesis of technology and nature, AURA-7 manifests as a fluid entity where metallic surfaces and soft light interact in a continuous, rhythmic dance, symbolizing the harmony of biological growth.

prompt: Hyper-realistic 3D abstract visualization of AURA-7, organic fluid dynamics, liquid chrome and iridescent glass ribbons intertwining, soft pulsating bioluminescent core, macro photography, cinematic lighting, ethereal atmosphere, 8k resolution, depth of field, minimalist background.
